title: Accepts His Central Role in the Final Confrontations
location: Climactic confrontation space within the People of Pisces conflict
situation: Manus steps into the center of decisive events, balancing perception and restraint while acting from unwavering recognition of Roz's significance.
knows: His bond to Roz is the core driver of his decisions
He is indispensable to resolving the conflict
Emotional restraint improves his effectiveness under pressure
does_not_know: Whether the outcome will save Roz or require sacrifice
What the post-conflict world will demand of him
Whether his emotional bond will remain unchanged after resolution
